ksa_text: Knowledge of clinical data management standards and requirements, including Good Clinical Practice (GCP) principles, Electronic Data Capture (eCDC) systems, clinical data coding conventions (MedDRA, WHO Drug Dictionary), and data integrity requirements for regulatory submissions.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of Personally Identifiable Information (PII) data security standards.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-003 (DQ, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4133 is insufficient to establish relevance to business intelligence development and analytics engineering at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.413, onet=0.387, dcwf=0.386) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4133 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DQ-domain KSA DQ-K-003 (composite 0.4133) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4133 for DQ domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for BI Developer at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DQ domain KSA at composite 0.4133 is not a standard requirement for BI Developer at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4133, domain DQ, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
